content_fingerprint: openai releases codex rust sdk alpha 0 126 0 openai has tagged a new alpha release of its codex rust sdk but public release notes are absent leaving builders to infer changes from the version bump alone openai published release rust v0 126 0 alpha 3 to its public codex repository on april 26 2026 marking the latest iteration of the project s rust implementation no accompanying changelog commit summary or release notes are visible on the public release page at this time the codex repository hosts openai s official client sdk for integrating its ai models into software products the rust sdk give
